ddls:
CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model output */,
  "raw_value" REAL /* Raw output value from the model */,
  "cumulative_value" REAL /* Cumulative value derived from the model output */,
  "logistic_value" REAL /* Logistic transformation of the model output */,
  "fractional_area" REAL /* Fractional area represented by the model output */,
  "training_omission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the output was omitted during training */,
  "test_omission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the output was omitted during testing */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the output was generated */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the model output */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the output */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model's purpose */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was collected */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in bytes */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the dataset */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for easy categorization and search */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_datasets" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "usage_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the dataset in the context of the model */,
  "validation_metrics" TEXT /* Metrics used to validate the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_datasets_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, run) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the model */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_types" (
  "risk_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk type */,
  "risk_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the risk type */,
  "mitigation_strategies" TEXT /* Strategies to mitigate the risk */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_risks" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "risk_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk type */,
  "risk_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the risk on the model */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the risk association */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_risks_risk_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("risk_type_id") REFERENCES risk_types ("risk_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_risks_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "output_id" INTEGER /* ID of the output */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_output_id FOREIGN KEY ("output_id") REFERENCES model_outputs ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the report */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "scenario_name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the scenario */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the scenario */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the scenario */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the scenario */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenario_models" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "scenario_description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario in the context of the model */,
  "expected_outcome" TEXT /* Expected outcome of the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_models_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenario_models_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is active */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity performed */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
